base_size.note: Varies by effect type - particles are 2-4px, speech bubble is 12x10px

shared_attributes.layer: foreground (on top of all other elements)

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Grooming indicator that appears when Echo is preening feathers
context.screen_position: Spawns from Echo's body at x=50-78px, y=55-65px, drifts horizontally left or right
context.usage_scenario: 2 feather particles spawn during echo_preening animation at frames 3 and 4. Each feather drifts horizontally (left or right) 8-10px over 0.5 seconds while fading. Indicates natural grooming behavior.

visual_specification.shape: Small feather fragment. 2x2px with 1 pixel extending to suggest feather shape (total 3px in L or T shape).

animation.description: Frame 1: Feather appears at spawn position. Frame 2: Moves horizontally 4px (left or right), begins fade (60%). Frame 3: Moves another 4px same direction, fades to 0%. Total horizontal movement: 8px. Duration: 0.5 seconds.

visual_specification.details: Feather: 2x2px base + 1px extension in #FFA300. Spawns at Echo's body edge (x=54 or x=74, y=60). Drifts left or right (50% chance each direction). 2 feathers spawn per preening animation. Horizontal-only movement (no vertical drift).

relationships.shared_with: Same orange color (#FFA300) as Echo's body feathers
relationships.differences_from: Unlike other particles: horizontal drift (not vertical), spawns from body (not head), smallest size (2x2px), shortest lifespan (0.5s).
